text:
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payment amount for each month for all Medicare fee-for-service 
(FFS) claims, Part D events (PDEs), and Medicare Advantage capitated payments for the beneficiary. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Claims files and MARx file (derived) 
VALUES: 
$ 
COMMENT: 
CCW calculates this variable as the sum of all CLM_PMT_AMT from the IP, SNF, HHA, Hospice, HOP, 
Carrier, and DME claims, plus the TOT_RX_CST_AMT for all PDEs, plus the MA capitated
